name: delegation
description: Tests multi-agent delegation: verifies that complex tasks trigger agent routing or subagent spawning.

cases.name: delegate-frontend-task
cases.input: Build a responsive navigation bar component using React and Tailwind CSS with a mobile hamburger menu.

cases.name: delegate-database-task
cases.input: Design a normalized database schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with user roles and permissions.

cases.name: delegate-security-audit
cases.input: Perform a security audit on this web application. Check for SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, and authentication vulnerabilities.

cases.name: delegate-devops-pipeline
cases.input: Set up a CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions that runs tests, builds a Docker image, and deploys to Kubernetes.

cases.name: delegate-cross-domain-task
cases.input: Create a full-stack feature: add a user analytics dashboard with a REST API backend, a React frontend with charts, and database migrations.

cases.name: delegate-documentation-task
cases.input: Write comprehensive API documentation for all endpoints in this project, including request/response examples and error codes.
